name: Fruit Zucchini Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, beat together the softened margarine, white sugar, and brown sugar until creamy.
3. Add eggs and 1 teaspoon vanilla; mix well.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk flour, salt, and baking powder.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Stir in shredded coconut, chopped dates, raisins, and shredded zucchini until evenly distributed.
7. Pour batter into a greased 13x9 inch baking pan.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. In another bowl, beat together melted margarine, milk, 1 teaspoon vanilla, cinnamon, and powdered sugar until smooth.
10. Pour glaze over the warm bars and sprinkle chopped walnuts on top.
11. Allow to cool before cutting into bars.
